degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Automatic levelling initiates movement to the brewing chamber, creates vibration which enables powder in the chamber to spread more evenly
Electronic tamping to guarantee consistent quality

fault_conditions.name: bean_hopper_empty_locked
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper is empty or locked preventing coffee grinding
fault_conditions.evidence: Error Code: S-010, Bean hopper right is empty or locked, The coffee dispensed is watery

maintenance_actions.name: product_test_runs
maintenance_actions.evidence: Ensure that at least 6 beverages are run using Product Test to achieve the desired coffee and extraction time

maintenance_actions.name: automatic_cleaning_cycle
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: brewing chamber cleanliness and coffee residue
maintenance_actions.evidence: Service of Eversys coffee machines depends on the number of brewing chambers: Légacy range: 12 months or every 50'000 products

assumptions.statement: Ticks are approximately equal to milliliters for water quantity measurement
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Ticks are approximately equal to ml' but does not provide exact conversion factor

assumptions.statement: Electronic tamping pressure is automatically controlled and not user-adjustable
assumptions.reason: Manual mentions 'Electronic tamping to guarantee consistent quality' but provides no pressure specifications or adjustment procedures
